long_description:
To collect the kmip cert details in mzoneb11

command :
acadia-cephadm shell -- ceph config-key get mgr/cephadm/spec.nfs.<nfs-id> | jq '.rank_map'
short_description: To collect the kmip cert details in mzoneb11
close_notes: Collected the kpmi cert detail for mzoneb11
